summary: QA host was configured through the renderer bridge; app reached Dashboard/Settings with the run-local host path and host fixture remained on disk.
Dashboard showed 3 skills, 1 project, and 0 warnings, matching core dashboard output, Skills Library, and Projects evidence.
Skills Library listed the three QA host skills from the configured run-local Skill Host Folder.
After moving the configured host path away, Dashboard and Settings reported host status missing, showed recovery guidance, and the app did not crash.
Reset All Data was executed through the Settings Danger Zone UI; the app returned to first-run Setup, metadata was cleared, and QA host/project fixtures were preserved.
After reset, the renderer showed the Setup screen rather than a blank window; dashboard core output had no active host and zero counts.
Reset cleared metadata tables, preserved schema migration version 23 with dirty=0, and left run-local fixture folders on disk.
